recommendations.title: Lemmy
recommendations.overview: Over four decades, Motorhead frontman Lemmy  Kilmister has registered an immeasurable impact on music history. Nearly 65, he remains the living embodiment of the rock and roll lifestyle, and this feature-length documentary tells his story, one of a h

recommendations.title: We're So Young
recommendations.overview: The life of Renato Russo, from his first involvement with music, to his years in the punk rock band Aborto Alétrico, to the formation of Legião Urbana, in the Brasília rock scene of 1970s and 1980s.

recommendations.title: Find Me Falling
recommendations.overview: After a failed comeback album, a rock star retreats to a cliffside home on Cyprus, only to find his new life complicated by visitors — and an old flame.

recommendations.title: Rock 'n' Roll High School
recommendations.overview: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.

recommendations.title: Four Minutes
recommendations.overview: Jenny is young. Her life is over. She killed someone. And she would do it again. When an 80-year-old piano teacher discovers the girl’s secret, her brutality and her dreams, she decides to transform her pupil into the musical wunderkind she once was.

recommendations.title: A Star Is Born
recommendations.overview: Drunken, has-been rock star John Norman Howard falls in love with unknown singer Esther Hoffman after seeing her perform at a club. He lets her sing a few songs at one of his shows and she becomes the talk of the music industry. Esther's star begins

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: There's Still Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: In postwar Rome, a working-class woman dreams of a better future for herself and her daughter while facing abuse at the hands of her domineering husband. When a mysterious letter arrives, she discovers the courage to change the circumstances of her l

recommendations.title: Tini: The New Life of Violetta
recommendations.overview: A teen star ventures out to the Italian countryside for a summer and emerges a new artist.

recommendations.title: Pink Floyd: The Wall
recommendations.overview: A troubled rock star descends into madness in the midst of his physical and social isolation from everyone.
